headline: Hedge Fund Delta Global Exited Its Stake in Abercrombie & Fitch Stock. Here's What That Means for Investors.
summary: Abercrombie & Fitch Co. operates a global specialty retail business with a diversified brand portfolio and an omnichannel sales strategy.
